message:
fix(test): correct test expectations to match actual function behavior (#10923)

Fix localStorage mock in versionUtils (use global mock, not Storage.prototype).
Fix wrong expected values in useCachedContainerd, useCachedOtel, useCachedDragonfly,
useCachedLonghorn tests to match actual function signatures and return values.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
